title: bursera sarukhanii
intro: Bursera sarukhanii, also known as the 'Mayan Copal', is a plant species belonging to the Burseraceae family, native to Mexico and Central America. The resin of the Bursera sarukhanii plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been shown to exhibit antimicrobial and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Bursera sarukhanii include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory issues, as well as its use in traditional medicine to treat wounds and skin conditions. Bursera sarukhanii is often prepared as a resin, essential oil, or tea, and is used in traditional herbal medicine, including in rituals and ceremonies to purify and protect the body and spirit.
